title: Security Outcomes, Threat Models, and Evidence · Execution Trace: Crypto Go Claim Evidence Ladder
summary: A medical records product says data is encrypted but cannot name the protected asset, attacker capability, required property, trust boundary, or evidence that would falsify the claim. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the claim evidence ladder increment in cryptographic outcome and evidence map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Separate mathematical primitive claims, API behavior, implementation evidence, deployment controls, compliance status, and stakeholder outcomes.
Model assets, actors, capabilities, entry points, trust boundaries, abuse cases, and acceptable residual risk before choosing a primitive.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Claim Evidence Ladder · Theory Crypto Go Claim Evidence Ladder
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 6189 during a backup restoration drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a cryptographic claim on asset, adversary, properties, trust boundaries, authorization, and bounded evidence; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate mathematical primitive claims, API behavior, implementation evidence, deployment controls, compliance status, and stakeholder outcomes.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Claim Evidence Ladder contract for the supplied data.
